restaurants.name: Yucay Brewpub
restaurants.ambience: Artisanal brewery with nice, cozy outdoor atmosphere
source_files: South America/All Inclusive Guide - Peru- Neha and Mayur.pdf

restaurants.name: HANKA Restaurant
restaurants.ambience: Cozy and wonderful dining experience with top-notch service
source_files: South America/All Inclusive Guide - Peru- Neha and Mayur.pdf

restaurants.name: Mixtura Valle
restaurants.ambience: Hip and cosy place with outdoor seating, beautiful garden in hacienda-style house
source_files: South America/All Inclusive Guide - Peru- Neha and Mayur.pdf

restaurants.name: La Dispensa Pizza e Pasta
source_files: South America/All Inclusive Guide - Peru- Neha and Mayur.pdf

attractions.name: Pisaq Market
attractions.description: Traditional market stop enroute from Cusco to Sacred Valley
source_files: South America/All Inclusive Guide - Peru- Neha and Mayur.pdf

attractions.name: Awana Kancha
attractions.description: Breeding center of South American camels (guanacos, llamas, alpacas and vicunas) where artisans demonstrate weaving and dyeing ancient Andean techniques
source_files: South America/All Inclusive Guide - Peru- Neha and Mayur.pdf

attractions.name: Maras Salt Mines
attractions.description: Salt mines where intense white shines like snow on sunny day, extracted from Inca times using same methods
source_files: South America/All Inclusive Guide - Peru- Neha and Mayur.pdf

attractions.name: Moray
attractions.description: Circular terraces similar to Greek amphitheater, used as open-air agricultural lab for adapting crops to different environmental conditions
source_files: South America/All Inclusive Guide - Peru- Neha and Mayur.pdf

attractions.name: Ollantaytambo
attractions.description: Fortress featuring Temple of the Sun (six gigantic monoliths weighing over 50 tons) and Terrace of Ten Niches
source_files: South America/All Inclusive Guide - Peru- Neha and Mayur.pdf

attractions.name: Sacred Valley Zipline
attractions.description: Zipline experience over magical valley with 300m iron ladder climb and 100m rappel descent
source_files: South America/All Inclusive Guide - Peru- Neha and Mayur.pdf
